description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.7 Docker image and a before_script that sets CURRENT_BUILD_PATH to the working directory and GOPATH to $CURRENT_BUILD_PATH/gopath. Define two stages: prepare and build. In the prepare stage add a job_gopath job that runs go get -u github.com/jarcoal/httpmock and stores the gopath/ directory as an artifact. In the build stage add a job_build:linux job that depends on job_gopath, runs env GOOS=linux GOARCH=386 go build -o build/firefly-go-linux-x86 -i ./firefly/ and saves the build/ directory as an artifact. Also add a job_build:win job that depends on job_gopath, runs env GOOS=windows GOARCH=386 go build -o build/firefly-go-win-x86 -i ./firefly/ and saves the build/ directory as an artifact.
